summary: Completed comprehensive testing of X67 Digital Media Groupe new features. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified admin panel (user block/delete, banner file upload), ad detail page (TopUp, Auto-TopUp, Referral), and Terms page (FREE posting info). Fixed admin user role issue in database and minor syntax error in AdDetailPage.jsx.
passed_tests: Admin block user - PUT /api/admin/users/{id} with is_blocked=true
Admin unblock user - PUT /api/admin/users/{id} with is_blocked=false
Admin delete user with all associated data - DELETE /api/admin/users/{id}
TopUp only works on own ads - returns 403 for others
TopUp only works on active ads - returns 400 for pending
Banner upload requires admin role - returns 403 for regular users
Banner upload rejects invalid file types
Terms page loads with FREE posting content
frontend_verified: Homepage loads with banner carousel and categories
Terms page shows FREE posting, TopUp, Auto-TopUp, and Referral info
Admin dashboard shows stats (users, ads, pending)
Admin users page shows Status column (Activ/Blocat)
Admin users page has block/unblock buttons (Ban icon)
Admin users page has delete buttons (Trash icon)
Admin banners page has file upload button instead of URL input
Admin banners form accepts images and videos (max 15 sec)
Ad detail page shows TopUp section for ad owner
Ad detail page shows Auto-TopUp toggle
Ad detail page shows Bonus Referral section with copy link button

fixes_applied.issue: Syntax error - extra closing brackets and comment

fixes_applied.fix: Updated role to 'admin' via database update

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during pytest execution for block/delete/topup tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) Admin user block/delete with status column showing Activ/Blocat, 2) Banner file upload (images/videos max 15 sec), 3) TopUp system (free, raises ad to top), 4) Auto-TopUp toggle (enabled by default), 5) Referral system (reduces cooldown from 60 to 40 min), 6) Terms page updated with FREE posting info. Admin role was fixed in database. Minor syntax fix applied to AdDetailPage.jsx.

mocked_apis.Viva Wallet Payment: Payment flow is bypassed - ad creation and TopUp are FREE without payment processing
